This requirement "Update health unit" is covered by test cases "T-1" (Register complaint), "T-3" (Register/Update data), and "T-7" (Update health unit). Test case "T-8" (Change logged employee) is not directly related to updating health units, but it includes the login functionality which is used in the requirement, so it is also considered to cover the requirement.
